title: PeterPack 1.20.6
description: Modpack that enhances the vanilla experience of Minecraft.
body: Welcome to Peter's Modpack, a customized Minecraft experience crafted! Dive into a world filled with adventure, creativity, and endless possibilities. This modpack is designed to enhance gameplay while maintaining the essence of vanilla Minecraft.![Ingame screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61db1ecf2e4e5c5501920839bc90992f4a344402.png)
